insight: If multiple attack targets are available and the opponent's blocker remains alive, continuing to attack the same unit (e.g., Borehole) may be correct to gain extra damage efficiency, assuming future attacks will still be available.
author: amalloy
context: Edge-case discussion of attack targeting in Iceblade games.

insight: Double Dynamo (two Thorium Dynamo) is preferable to single Dynamo + Borehole Patroller early in higher-econ sets because it provides better economic acceleration; Borehole comes later after establishing sufficient income.
author: wilson0862
context: Strategic preference regarding early Thorium Dynamo build orders.
